pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the tiny-gpu repository, explaining its educational purpose and the core concepts of GPU architecture it demonstrates

pages.title: Architecture Overview
pages.purpose: Provide a high-level overview of the tiny-gpu architecture, including the core components and their relationships

pages.title: Memory System
pages.purpose: Explain the memory hierarchy, including program memory, data memory, and potential cache implementation

pages.title: Execution Model
pages.purpose: Detail how instructions are executed across multiple threads and cores in the tiny-gpu architecture

pages.title: Hardware Modules
pages.purpose: Provide an introduction to the various hardware modules that make up the tiny-gpu

pages.title: GPU Module
pages.purpose: Explain the top-level GPU module, its parameters, interfaces, and how it connects other modules

pages.title: Core Module
pages.purpose: Detail the core module which processes blocks of threads, including its internal architecture

pages.title: Thread Execution Units
pages.purpose: Provide an overview of the units that handle thread execution within a core

pages.title: ALU (Arithmetic Logic Unit)
pages.purpose: Explain the ALU module which performs arithmetic and logical operations

pages.title: LSU (Load/Store Unit)
pages.purpose: Detail the LSU module which handles memory access operations

pages.title: PC (Program Counter)
pages.purpose: Explain the PC module which calculates the next program counter for each thread

pages.title: Register File
pages.purpose: Detail the registers module which implements register files for each thread

pages.title: Fetcher and Decoder
pages.purpose: Explain the modules responsible for fetching and decoding instructions

pages.title: Memory Controllers
pages.purpose: Detail the memory controller modules that manage access to program and data memory

pages.title: Dispatcher and Device Control
pages.purpose: Explain the dispatcher module that manages thread distribution to cores and the device control register

pages.title: Instruction Set Architecture (ISA)
pages.purpose: Provide an overview of the tiny-gpu instruction set architecture

pages.title: Instruction Format
pages.purpose: Detail the format of instructions in the tiny-gpu ISA

pages.title: Instruction Types
pages.purpose: Explain the different types of instructions supported by the tiny-gpu ISA

pages.title: Programming Model
pages.purpose: Explain the programming model used in tiny-gpu, including threads, blocks, and kernels

pages.title: Matrix Addition Example
pages.purpose: Walk through the matrix addition kernel as an example of programming the tiny-gpu

pages.title: Matrix Multiplication Example
pages.purpose: Walk through the matrix multiplication kernel as a more complex example

pages.title: Build and Testing
pages.purpose: Explain how to build the tiny-gpu and run the test suite

pages.title: Build System
pages.purpose: Detail the build system implemented by the Makefile

pages.title: Testing Framework
pages.purpose: Explain the cocotb-based testing framework used to verify the tiny-gpu's functionality

pages.title: Memory Simulation
pages.purpose: Detail how memory is simulated in the testing environment

pages.title: Hardware Implementation
pages.purpose: Discuss the physical implementation aspects of the tiny-gpu
